title: field list
text: field list A property of a component entity that determines how Uniface manages the fields when retrieving occurrences into the component. It can be used to enhance runtime performance. When using the Uniface Server, fields not in the field list are not sent over the network. Related Links Field List Specifies the component entity fields that Uniface manages at runtime. Valid values are Automatic (default), All Fields, and User-defined. hitlist A temporary list of the primary key or physical record address of every occurrence of an entity in a database that matches a retrieve profile (each occurrence is one hit), but which has not yet been fetched from the database. The actual occurrences are fetched only when required. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
